'''chanasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalogenicity|encephalogenicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalogenicity|encephalogenicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chanasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chænæshæth|chænæshæth]] || [[word:chænæshæj|chænæshæj]] || [[word:chænæshæsh|chænæshæsh]] || [[word:chænæshæ|chænæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chananashath|chananashath]] || [[word:chananashaj|chananashaj]] || [[word:chananashash|chananashash]] || [[word:chananasha|chananasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanashath|chanashath]] || [[word:chanashaj|chanashaj]] || [[word:chanashash|chanashash]] || [[word:chanasha|chanasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanafshath|chanafshath]] || [[word:chanafshaj|chanafshaj]] || [[word:chanafshash|chanafshash]] || [[word:chanafshaf|chanafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chanashatha|chanashatha]] || [[word:chanashaja|chanashaja]] || [[word:chanashasha|chanashasha]] || [[word:chanashaka|chanashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chanashath|chanashath]] || [[word:chanashaj|chanashaj]] || [[word:chanashash|chanashash]] || [[word:chanasha|chanasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chanashathal|chanashathal]] || [[word:chanashajal|chanashajal]] || [[word:chanashashal|chanashashal]] || [[word:chanashakal|chanashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chanashathatha|chanashathatha]] || [[word:chanashajaja|chanashajaja]] || [[word:chanashashasha|chanashashasha]] || [[word:chanashaka|chanashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chanashathan|chanashathan]] || [[word:chanashajan|chanashajan]] || [[word:chanashashan|chanashashan]] || [[word:chanashakan|chanashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chanashathaoro|chanashathaoro]] || [[word:chanashajaoro|chanashajaoro]] || [[word:chanashashaoro|chanashashaoro]] || [[word:chanashakaoro|chanashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
